# Nutrify AI — Nutrition & Health Guides

> Evidence-based nutrition, weight-management, GLP-1 (Mounjaro/Ozempic/Wegovy), and high-protein guides published by the team behind Nutrify AI — an all-in-one AI nutrition and health app (iOS & Android) that scans meals to auto-log calories, macros, and protein, with personalised plans and 24/7 AI coaching.

## About
- Nutrify AI app: https://nutrify.info
- This guides site: https://nutrition.nutrify.info
- Content is general nutrition information, not medical advice. Articles touching medications or medical conditions advise consulting a doctor, pharmacist, or registered dietitian.

## Key topics
- GLP-1 / Mounjaro nutrition (meal plans, what to eat, foods to avoid, side-effect management, protein/muscle preservation)
- High-protein eating (breakfasts, snacks, low-calorie meals, getting enough protein from whole food)
- Calorie & macro tracking, weight loss, gut health

## Sitemap
- https://nutrition.nutrify.info/sitemap-index.xml
